title: Bed dress carcase
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Bed dress carcase demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Position carcase

pcs.text: Position carcase correctly in cradle to provide good access by operators in accordance with workplace requirements.1.2 Position carcase in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position carcase correctly in cradle to provide good access by operators in accordance with workplace requirements.1.2 Position carcase in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position carcase correctly in cradle to provide good access by operators in accordance with workplace requirements.1.2 Position carcase in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Position carcase

elements.title: Complete opening cuts

pcs.text: Perform opening cuts in accordance with workplace requirements.2.2 Identify and meet workplace health and safety requirements.2.3 Split hide correctly from the udder/cod and to the point of the brisket with outward cuts to avoid contamination and puncturing.2.4 Flank carcase with both left and right sides split from the flank to the shoulder area.2.5 Carefully make opening cuts around both forelegs with incision from pit to hock.2.6 Clear hide from both forelegs in accordance with workplace procedures.2.7 Open hide to the neck along the length of the brisket.2.8 Clear hide from both sides of neck and deep into the neck and shoulders clearing the brisket.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform opening cuts in accordance with workplace requirements.2.2 Identify and meet workplace health and safety requirements.2.3 Split hide correctly from the udder/cod and to the point of the brisket with outward cuts to avoid contamination and puncturing.2.4 Flank carcase with both left and right sides split from the flank to the shoulder area.2.5 Carefully make opening cuts around both forelegs with incision from pit to hock.2.6 Clear hide from both forelegs in accordance with workplace procedures.2.7 Open hide to the neck along the length of the brisket.2.8 Clear hide from both sides of neck and deep into the neck and shoulders clearing the brisket?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform opening cuts in accordance with workplace requirements.2.2 Identify and meet workplace health and safety requirements.2.3 Split hide correctly from the udder/cod and to the point of the brisket with outward cuts to avoid contamination and puncturing.2.4 Flank carcase with both left and right sides split from the flank to the shoulder area.2.5 Carefully make opening cuts around both forelegs with incision from pit to hock.2.6 Clear hide from both forelegs in accordance with workplace procedures.2.7 Open hide to the neck along the length of the brisket.2.8 Clear hide from both sides of neck and deep into the neck and shoulders clearing the brisket.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Complete opening cuts

elements.title: Remove hide

pcs.text: Remove hide employing measures and techniques to avoid damage to, or contamination of, carcase.3.2 Dispose of hide in accordance with workplace requirements.3.3 Perform all operations in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Remove hide
